game.name: cue_n_woo
game.description: Two-player theory-of-mind game backed by Bedrock Claude Sonnet.

tokens.description: One connection token per player slot. Runner-injected.

bedrock_model_id.description: Bedrock modelId for the hidden judge and scorer. BEDROCK_CLAUDE_MODEL_ID or BEDROCK_MODEL can override this at runtime.

bedrock_region.description: AWS region for Bedrock Runtime calls.

stub_bedrock.description: If true, the game returns deterministic canned Bedrock responses. Used by certification so the smoke test runs offline with no AWS dependency. Never set in real play.

max_question_tokens.description: Simple whitespace-token limit for submitted questions/prompts. Questions may use normal prompt whitespace.

max_answer_tokens.description: Simple whitespace-token limit for player answers. Answers may contain printable keyboard characters and single spaces only.

scoring_temperature.description: Bedrock temperature used for each forced-choice scoring sample.

scoring_samples.description: Number of Claude forced-choice samples used to estimate answer probabilities.

concept_type.description: axis_combo samples one option each from several concept-axis JSON files and joins them; list selects from data/concepts.json; specific uses specific_concept; random uses a seeded private style label.

concept_index.description: Optional fixed index into data/concepts.json when concept_type is list.

specific_concept.description: Exact text concept when concept_type is specific. This is server-private and is not sent to players.

concept_seed.description: Seed for random concept vectors. This is server-private and is not sent to players.

concept_list_path.description: Optional path to a JSON array of text concepts.

concept_axes_path.description: Optional path to a directory of per-axis JSON arrays, or a JSON object mapping axis names to arrays.

concept_axis_names.description: Optional subset of concept axis names to sample from when concept_type is axis_combo.

concept_axis_count.description: Number of distinct axes to sample and concatenate when concept_type is axis_combo.

reveal_concept_to_clients.description: Whether final player/global state includes the hidden concept. Defaults false.

include_concept_in_results.description: Whether final results/replay artifacts include the hidden concept. Defaults false.

readme.value:
# Cue-n-Woo

A two-player theory-of-mind game. A hidden-style Bedrock Claude Sonnet judge answers questions in a secret persona. Each player privately interviews the judge, then writes challenge questions plus their own answers. Players also answer the opponent's challenge questions. The server scores how well each answer matches the judge's style by sampling Claude Sonnet nine times per challenge, and the player who better predicts the judge wins.

## Flow

1. `private_questions`: each player asks the judge up to three private questions.
2. `proposals`: each player submits three challenge questions, each with their own answer.
3. `answers`: each player answers the opponent's three challenge questions. An empty answer is a permitted decline and scores 0; non-empty answers need at least three non-space characters.
4. `reveal`: the hidden concept is revealed and the round is scored.

The hidden concept is server-private during play.

content.value:
# Cue-n-Woo Rules

Two players independently ask a hidden-style Bedrock Claude Sonnet judge up to three private questions. Each player then writes three challenge questions plus their own answers. Players also answer the opponent's challenge questions. The server scores answer likelihoods by sampling Claude Sonnet nine times for each forced-choice comparison. The hidden concept is server-private during play.

# Playing Cue-n-Woo

Connect your player to the Coworld-provided `COWORLD_PLAYER_WS_URL`. Send `ask`, `propose`, and `answer` messages as described in the player protocol.

player.name: Baseline Player
player.description: Bedrock Claude LLM player harness; the model makes every decision via submit_action and retries validation errors.

player.name: Stub Player
player.description: Deterministic offline stub for certification; asks/proposes precommitted text and always answers from a backup list, no LLM or AWS.

player.name: Kyle Policy
player.description: Baseline LLM harness seeded with Kyle's optional per-phase question suggestions; the model may freely ignore them.

commissioner.name: Cue n Woo Commissioner
commissioner.description: Cue n Woo commissioner with leaderboard-neighbor scheduling and throttled episode dispatch.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Two-player default cue-n-woo game with a ten-minute hard timer.
